reconfigure.title: Reconfigure SPAR Online
reconfigure.description: Update your online.spar.si credentials or store.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate with SPAR Online
reauth_confirm.description: Your session has expired. Please enter your password again.

data.auto_sync: Auto-sync shopping list to cart on new cart

data_description.auto_sync: When a new SPAR cart is detected, automatically add all pending shopping list items to the cart.

search_products.name: Search products
search_products.description: Search for grocery products in SPAR Online by name.

add_to_cart.name: Add to cart
add_to_cart.description: Add a product to the SPAR Online cart by SKU.

sku.name: SKU
sku.description: Product reference code from search results.

search_term.name: Search term
search_term.description: Original search term to save preference.

remove_from_cart.name: Remove from cart
remove_from_cart.description: Remove a product from the cart.

get_cart.name: Get cart
get_cart.description: Get current cart contents with all items and prices.

get_preferences.name: Get preferences
get_preferences.description: Get saved product preferences for search terms.

sync_list_to_cart.name: Sync shopping list to cart
sync_list_to_cart.description: Add all pending shopping list items to the SPAR cart. Marks added items as completed.

refresh_cart.name: Refresh cart from SPAR Online
refresh_cart.description: Immediately fetch the latest cart state from online.spar.si, bypassing the polling interval.
